## DB coverage update

Auto-generated by the weekly DB coverage pipeline. Contains stub TOML files
for packages that appear in popular open-source projects but are not yet in
the dep-audit database.

### Before merging

For each new file in `src/dep_audit/db/`, fill in:
- `type` — `stdlib_backport` | `zombie_shim` | `deprecated` | `micro_utility`
- `replacement` — what to use instead
- `reason` — short human-readable explanation

Remove any stubs that don't actually belong in the DB.

### Scanned repos

| Ecosystem | Repos |
|-----------|-------|
| Python | fastapi, django, flask, requests, httpx, sqlmodel, pydantic, celery, ansible, home-assistant |
| npm | express, nestjs, next.js, nuxt, svelte, axios, lodash, moment |
| Cargo | tokio, serde, actix-web, hyper, clap |
